infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Mental Health Fitness to access your photos so you can set a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Mental Health Fitness to use the camera for profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID to unlock Mental Health Fitness.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Mental Health Fitness to access your photos for profile pictures.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Mental Health Fitness to take a profile photo.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Use Face ID to unlock Mental Health Fitness.
